nba.title: OKC locks up No. 1 seed, joins elite company
nba.summary: The Thunder clinched the NBA's best regular-season record with a win over the Clippers on Wednesday night, joining some exclusive historical company.

nba.title: Cunningham has double-double in Pistons return
nba.summary: Cade Cunningham had 13 points and 10 assists in his return from a collapsed lung as the Pistons routed the Bucks on Wednesday night.

nba.title: Sources: Kings' late foul was error, not tanking
nba.summary: The NBA is looking into what team sources say was a strategy mistake by Kings coach Doug Christie -- and not tanking tactics -- during Tuesday's loss to the Warriors.

nba.title: Mavs dispute claim they erred with Reaves' MRI
nba.summary: The Mavericks disputed Lakers coach JJ Redick's claim that their medical team examined the wrong part of Austin Reaves' body when the guard received an MRI by Dallas' staff.

nba.title: Redick downplays sideline quarrel with Vanderbilt
nba.summary: Lakers coach JJ Redick subbed forward Jarred Vanderbilt out of early in the second quarter, leading to a heated exchange between the two that Redick described as a "normal interaction" for him.

nba.title: Wemby (rib), Castle (knee) miss win vs. Blazers
nba.summary: The Spurs ruled Victor Wembanyama (bruised left rib) and Stephon Castle (sore right knee) out for their game Wednesday against the Trail Blazers.

nba.title: Tatum preps for MSG return: 'Just another game'
nba.summary: Jayson Tatum said that although he's not thrilled to return to the arena where he tore an Achilles less than a year ago, he is aiming to treat Thursday's matchup against the Knicks at MSG as "just ano

nba.title: Bucks' Rivers, asked about future, talks grandkids
nba.summary: Doc Rivers declined to give a definitive answer but spoke about his desire to spend more time with his grandchildren when he was asked Tuesday about his coaching future.

nba.title: 🏀 Postseason tracker: Who's in, who's out?
nba.summary: The 2025-26 NBA postseason is fast approaching. Stay up to date with which teams have clinched.

nba.title: Inside the 'strange phenomenon' the NBA is struggling to contain
nba.summary: With tanking strategies growing in both audaciousness and frequency of use, can the league get its arms around the often-effective practice?

soccer.title: How fluid PSG exposed Slot's back-five tweak
soccer.summary: Arne Slot changed Liverpool's shape for their Champions League quarter-final first leg - but their tactics were still bested by European champions Paris St-Germain. Umir Irfan explains how.

soccer.title: Howe's future & likely sales - why Newcastle face key summer
soccer.summary: Newcastle's inconsistent season leaves them facing a defining summer - with questions over Eddie Howe's future and sales of key players a possibility. BBC Sport assesses the situation.

soccer.title: Liverpool still alive - but their season now hangs by a thread
soccer.summary: Negative tactics and no shots on target - but somehow Liverpool's Champions League campaign is still just about alive after a 2-0 loss at PSG.

soccer.title: Dominant PSG beat Liverpool in quarter-final first leg
soccer.summary: Goals from Desire Doue and Khvicha Kvaratskhelia give PSG a 2-0 victory over Liverpool in the first-leg of their Champions League quarter-final.

soccer.title: Alvarez scores superb free-kick as Atletico beat 10-man Barca
soccer.summary: Julian Alvarez and Alexander Sorloth give Atletico Madrid a 2-0 victory over 10-man Barcelona in their Champions League quarter-final first leg at the Nou Camp.

soccer.title: Back Haaland and Semenyo to shine at Chelsea - FPL team of the week
soccer.summary: Put your faith in trusted FPL assets such as Bruno Fernandes and Antoine Semenyo this week, with a double gameweek on the horizon.

soccer.title: Wood in Forest squad after six months out injured
soccer.summary: Striker Chris Wood will end his six-month injury lay-off by returning to the Nottingham Forest squad in Porto.

soccer.title: Dortmund weigh up third Sancho move - Thursday's gossip
soccer.summary: Borussia Dortmund weighing up third move Jadon Sancho, Tottenham pushing to sign goalkeeper James Trafford, Arsenal targeting defenders Victor Valdepena and Jacobo Ramon, plus more.

soccer.title: How 11 Premier League teams could qualify for Europe
soccer.summary: Eleven Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far fetched as it seems.

soccer.title: Raya? Neuer? Maignan? Who are world's best goalkeepers?
soccer.summary: David Raya and Manuel Neuer dazzled in the Champions League this week - but are they among the world's best goalkeepers?
